content: {"key_findings":["2025 meta-analysis of 10 RCTs (n=701) shows IF significantly reduces fasting blood glucose (SMD -0.51), LDL-C (SMD -0.34), and IL-6 (SMD -0.30) in metabolic syndrome adults","Comprehensive 2022 review (64 studies, 4,052 participants) stratifies four IF modalities (ADF, TRF, RF) across obesity, T2D, and MetS populations with quantitative synthesis of 47 studies","Emerging cardiovascular risk signal: 8-hour time-restricted eating linked to 91% higher CV mortality risk, creating active scientific debate","IF demonstrates consistent benefits on glycemic control, lipid profile, and inflammatory markers with GRADE-assessed evidence quality","Multiple IF protocols (alternate-day, time-restricted, religious/Ramadan) show differential effects requiring protocol-specific risk-benefit analysis"],"perspective_gaps":["Historical perspective on fasting traditions and their documented health outcomes over time","Regional perspective on cultural variations (Ramadan, Eastern Orthodox, Buddhist practices) and population-specific responses","Regulatory perspective on FDA/EMA positioning and clinical guidelines","Industry perspective on commercial IF programs and app-based interventions","Economic perspective on cost-effectiveness versus pharmacological alternatives"],"web_queries":[],"academic_queries":[],"exa_queries":[],"convergence_assessment":"saturated","should_continue":false,"reasoning":"Evidence base is saturated: two high-quality systematic reviews covering 74 studies and 4,753+ participants comprehensively address benefits (metabolic, glycemic, lipid, inflammatory) and risks (CV mortality signal). Core sub-questions on efficacy, safety, and mechanism have strong GRADE-assessed evidence. The 91% CV mortality finding and meta-analytic benefits provide balanced risk-benefit data. Additional rounds would yield diminishing returns relative to synthesis priority.","knowledge_gaps":["Long-term (>2 year) outcomes for IF adherence and sustained metabolic benefits","Mechanistic reconciliation of conflicting CV mortality signal versus cardiometabolic improvements","Population-specific contraindications (pregnancy, eating disorders, elderly, diabetic medication users)","Head-to-head comparative effectiveness of IF protocols (16:8 vs 5:2 vs ADF) in matched populations","Dose-response relationships between fasting window duration and clinical outcomes"]}
